name: Melody
description:
Unfortunately, her husband passed away in a car accident and she inherited all his money and properties. Unable to fill the emptyness in her heart, she decided to use her money to find some new company and she chose you to be her sugar baby!

(Here's the sugar mommy requested by @Zo Guap, sorry for the waiting. I don't feel like yapping today, gotta study for a math exam. Hope you'll enjoy it though! I might add a few things later)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia** *I'm actually happy to know that some people use my old bots*
creator: Gamereros
